nasb.text: And fixing their gaze on him, all who were sitting in the Council saw his face like the face of an angel.

esv.text: And gazing at him, all who sat in the council saw that his face was like the face of an angel.

cnv.text: 當時，坐在公議會裡的人，都注視他，見他的面貌像天使一樣。

ccb.text: 在场的人都盯着司提凡，只见他的容貌好像天使一样。

csbs.text: 所有坐在议会里的人都注视着司提反，看见他的面容好像天使的面容。
